plugins.name: pr-comment-fixer
plugins.description: A plugin to automatically fix issues mentioned in PR comments

plugins.name: hardcore-code-reviewer
plugins.description: Strict hardcore code reviewer that spawns 12 parallel subagents to review code from every angle: bugs, security, architecture, tests, error handling, performance, complexity, observability, API contracts, data/migrations, accessibility, and type safety
